title: Sharekhan Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sharekhan Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sharekhan Global Group! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sharekhan Global Group:
Sharekhan Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan Global Group!
